question: What is the capital of France?

reward.title: Berkhamsted Castle
reward.description: Historic Norman castle ruins dating back to 1066. A fascinating piece of English history set in beautiful grounds by the town.

reward.title: Berkhamsted High Street
reward.description: The vibrant heart of Berkhamsted town! Lined with independent shops, cafes, and restaurants showcasing local character and charm.

reward.title: Berkhamsted Pool & Recreation Ground
reward.description: Outdoor swimming pool and sports facilities set in a beautiful, open park. Perfect for enjoying the outdoors in Berkhamsted.

reward.title: Water Gardens
reward.description: Beautiful park featuring lovely water gardens, walking paths, and green spaces. A peaceful retreat in the heart of Berkhamsted.
